prompt: Add thick white outline to each piece of the collage. The outline should be uniform in thickness and stay at the same layer as the collage pieces.
prompt_refined: Using image 1 as the source, add a prominent, uniform white outline to the external edge of each distinct paper cut-out piece within the collage. The outline should precisely trace the contour of each element and maintain a consistent thickness throughout.
objects: Collage of various paper cut-out images
Prominent, uniform white outlines around the external edge of each individual paper cut-out piece

Paper cut-out image of a woman with dark curly hair and a green coat

Paper cut-out image of a woman reclining in a patterned dress
